title: Profile
description: Manage your account settings and preferences

error.loadingDescription: Failed to load profile information. Please refresh the page.

validation.firstNameTooLong: First name must be 50 characters or less
validation.lastNameTooLong: Last name must be 50 characters or less
validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

descriptions.emailNote: Note: Changing your email may require re-verification

notifications.updateSuccessDescription: Your profile information has been updated successfully.
notifications.updateFailedDescription: Failed to update profile. Please try again.
notifications.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

notifications.signOutSuccessDescription: You have been signed out of your account.
notifications.signOutFailedDescription: An error occurred while signing out. Please try again.

appearance.title: Appearance Settings
appearance.darkModeDescription: Switch between light and dark theme
appearance.themeChanged: The application theme has been changed to {{mode}} mode.

rewards.title: Rewards center
rewards.description: Manage your progression, badges, privacy settings, scanner themes, and referrals.

badges.title: Badge collection
badges.description: Equip your proudest unlocks and preview upcoming milestones.

night_owl.name: Night owl
night_owl.description: Log a qualifying scan during the late-night window.

early_bird.name: Early bird
early_bird.description: Start your day with an early successful scan.

seven_day_streak.name: 7-day streak
seven_day_streak.description: Maintain a seven-day login or scan streak.

thirty_day_streak.name: 30-day streak
thirty_day_streak.description: Stay consistent long enough to hit a full month streak.

referral_starter.name: Referral starter
referral_starter.description: Invite your first friend who completes sign-up.

receipt_historian.name: Receipt historian
receipt_historian.description: Build a rich archive of organized receipts.

community_helper.name: Community helper
community_helper.description: Contribute to referral and engagement milestones.

themes.title: Scanner themes
themes.description: Choose from the scanner looks you have unlocked.

default.title: Classic
default.description: The familiar scanner look available from day one.

ocean.title: Ocean
ocean.description: A cool blue theme for focused scanning sessions.

forest.title: Forest
forest.description: A calm green theme earned through sustained streaks.

sunset.title: Sunset
sunset.description: A warm premium look reserved for higher progression.

privacy.title: Leaderboard privacy
privacy.description: Control whether your profile can appear in public rankings.
privacy.leaderboardOptInHint: Opt in before your progression appears in leaderboard previews.
privacy.displayModeHint: Choose whether to show your public identity or stay anonymous.

referrals.title: Referral summary
referrals.description: Share your referral code and track successful invites.

shareCards.title: Shareable achievement cards
shareCards.description: Create milestone cards you can share from your device or download as image files.
shareCards.shareFailed: Unable to prepare the share card

level.title: Level {{level}} reached
level.subtitle: Built with every successful scan and review.
level.shareText: I just reached Level {{level}} on MataResit.

streak.title: {{days}}-day scan streak
streak.subtitle: Consistency keeps the rewards flowing.
streak.shareText: I’m on a {{days}}-day MataResit scan streak.

badge.title: Badge unlocked
badge.subtitle: Another milestone added to my rewards shelf.
badge.shareText: I just unlocked the {{badge}} badge on MataResit.

deductible.title: Deductible total tracked
deductible.subtitle: Every tax-ready receipt makes the next filing easier.
deductible.shareText: I’ve tracked {{total}} in deductible receipts with MataResit.

signOutSuccess.title: Signed out successfully
signOutSuccess.description: You have been signed out of your account.
